name: Maggie Hassan
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,363,137 for Maggie Hassan in U.S. Senate, NH. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
